title: Heavy VTOL model
wikitext:
[]: Heavy VTOL model.             Quote Post by Cypher » Sun Dec 20, 2009 8:15 am I was wondering if anyone knows an online store that stocks something along the lines of a constructable model of the VTOL or one that comes prebuilt. I've seen really small ones that come in figure packs but I am after something 1:144 scale or larger. Thank you in advance!

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sun Dec 20, 2009 11:15 pm plastic injection kits of it were never produced in any scale. looking around the internets for a bit i've found a few scratchbuilds, but then finally stumbled upon this: http://www.hlj.com/product/KBYEV-22 turns out Kotobukiya made a 1/100 resin kit of it back in 1997. since it's a resin kit from quite a while ago it's probably rather scarce, but there is actually one on Y!J auctions: http://page8.auctions.yahoo.co.jp/jp/auction/h131694248 good luck aquiring one

[]:             Quote Post by Cypher » Sun Dec 20, 2009 11:54 pm Ouch $122 I think that model is a bit out of my price range but thanks for your help anyway. Atleast now I know they were actaully produced at one stage so I might be able to find a cheaper one if I am lucky.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Mon Dec 21, 2009 9:24 am You can always scratchbuild your own :3 Much less trouble than trying to find an old resin kit for cheap, and you can make it BIGGER, more detailed, with a fully furnished cockpit, etc.
